43: /**
44:  * SSH channel with authentication by password.
45:  * @since 1.4
46:  * @see Ssh For SSH channel with authenticaton using private key.
47:  */
48: @ToString
49: @EqualsAndHashCode(of = "password", callSuper = true)
50: public final class SshByPassword extends AbstractSshShell {
51: 
52:     /**
53:      * User password.
54:      */
55:     private final transient String password;
56: 
57:     /**
58:      * Constructor.
59:      * @param adr IP address
60:      * @param prt Port of server
61:      * @param user Login
62:      * @param passwd Password
63:      * @throws UnknownHostException If fails
64:      * @checkstyle ParameterNumberCheck (6 lines)
65:      */
66:     public SshByPassword(final String adr, final int prt, final String user, final String passwd) throws UnknownHostException {
67:         super(adr, prt, user);
68:         this.password = passwd;
69:     }
70: 
71:     // @checkstyle ProtectedMethodInFinalClassCheck (10 lines)
72:     @Override
73:     @RetryOnFailure(attempts = Tv.SEVEN, delay = 1, unit = TimeUnit.MINUTES, verbose = false, types = IOException.class)
74:     protected Session session() throws IOException {
75:         try {
76:             JSch.setLogger(new JschLogger());
77:             final JSch jsch = new JSch();
78:             Logger.debug(this, "Opening SSH session to %s@%s:%s (auth with password)...", this.getLogin(), this.getAddr(), this.getPort());
79:             final Session session = jsch.getSession(this.getLogin(), this.getAddr(), this.getPort());
80:             session.setConfig("StrictHostKeyChecking", "no");
81:             session.setPassword(this.password);
82:             session.setServerAliveInterval((int) TimeUnit.SECONDS.toMillis(Tv.TEN));
83:             session.setServerAliveCountMax(Tv.MILLION);
84:             session.connect((int) TimeUnit.SECONDS.toMillis(10L));
85:             return session;
86:         } catch (final JSchException ex) {
87:             throw new IOException(ex);
88:         }
89:     }
90: }

<content>210:      * @param arg Argument to escape

213:     @SuppressWarnings("PMD.ProhibitPublicStaticMethods")

218:     // @checkstyle ProtectedMethodInFinalClassCheck (10 lines)
219:     @Override
220:     @RetryOnFailure(attempts = Tv.SEVEN, delay = 1, unit = TimeUnit.MINUTES, verbose = false, types = IOException.class)
221:     protected Session session() throws IOException {
222:         final File file = File.createTempFile("jcabi-ssh", ".key");
223:         try {
224:             JSch.setLogger(new JschLogger());
225:             final JSch jsch = new JSch();
226:             new Unchecked<>(new LengthOf(new TeeInput(this.key.replaceAll("\r", "").replaceAll("\n\\s+|\n{2,}", "\n").trim(), file))).value();
227:             jsch.setHostKeyRepository(new EasyRepo());
228:             if (this.passphrase == null) {
229:                 jsch.addIdentity(file.getAbsolutePath());
230:             } else {
231:                 jsch.addIdentity(this.getLogin(), this.key.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8), null, this.passphrase.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8));
232:             }
233:             Logger.debug(this, "Opening SSH session to %s@%s:%s (%d bytes in RSA key)...", this.getLogin(), this.getAddr(), this.getPort(), file.length());
234:             return this.session(jsch);
235:         } catch (final JSchException ex) {
236:             throw new IOException(ex);
237:         } finally {
238:             Files.deleteIfExists(file.toPath());
239:         }
240:     }
241:

250:         session.setConfig("StrictHostKeyChecking", "no");

252:         session.setServerAliveInterval((int) TimeUnit.SECONDS.toMillis(1L));
253:         session.setServerAliveCountMax(Tv.MILLION);
254:         session.connect((int) TimeUnit.SECONDS.toMillis(10L));
255:         Logger.debug(this, "SSH session opened to %s@%s:%s", this.getLogin(), this.getAddr(), this.getPort());

<content>1: package github.chains;
2: 
3: import com.github.javaparser.JavaParser;
4: import com.github.javaparser.ParseResult;
5: import com.github.javaparser.ast.CompilationUnit;
6: import com.github.javaparser.ast.Node;
7: import com.github.javaparser.ast.NodeList;
8: import com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.Expression;
9: import com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.IntegerLiteralExpr;
10: import com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.MemberValuePair;
11: import com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.NameExpr;
12: import com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.NormalAnnotationExpr;
13: import com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.SingleMemberAnnotationExpr;
14: import com.github.javaparser.ast.visitor.ModifierVisitor;
15: 
16: import java.io.File;
17: import java.nio.file.Files;
18: import java.util.HashMap;
19: import java.util.Map;
20: 
21: public class Main {
22: 
23:     private static final Map<String, Integer> TV_CONSTANTS = new HashMap<>();
24: 
25:     static {
26:         TV_CONSTANTS.put("SEVEN", 7);
27:         TV_CONSTANTS.put("TEN", 10);
28:         TV_CONSTANTS.put("MILLION", 1000000);
29:     }
30: 
31:     public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
32:         if (args.length < 1) {
33:             System.err.println("Usage: java Main <source-file-or-directory>");
34:             System.exit(1);
35:         }
36: 
37:         String path = args[0];
38:         File file = new File(path);
39: 
40:         if (file.isDirectory()) {
41:             for (File f : file.listFiles((dir, name) -> name.endsWith(".java"))) {
42:                 processFile(f);
43:             }
44:         } else {
45:             processFile(file);
46:         }
47: 
48:         System.out.println("Transformation completed successfully.");
49:     }
50: 
51:     private static void processFile(File file) throws Exception {
52:         System.out.println("Processing: " + file.getAbsolutePath());
53: 
54:         String content = Files.readString(file.toPath());
55:         JavaParser parser = new JavaParser();
56:         ParseResult<CompilationUnit> result = parser.parse(content);
57: 
58:         if (!result.isSuccessful() || result.getResult().isEmpty()) {
59:             System.err.println("Failed to parse: " + file.getAbsolutePath());
60:             result.getProblems().forEach(p -> System.err.println(p.getMessage()));
61:             return;
62:         }
63: 
64:         CompilationUnit cu = result.getResult().get();
65: 
66:         cu.getImports().removeIf(
67:             importDecl -> "com.jcabi.aspects.Tv".equals(importDecl.getNameAsString())
68:         );
69: 
70:         TvReplacementVisitor visitor = new TvReplacementVisitor();
71:         cu.accept(visitor, null);
72: 
73:         Files.writeString(file.toPath(), cu.toString());
74:         System.out.println("  Fixed: " + file.getAbsolutePath());
75:     }
76: 
77:     @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
78:     private static class TvReplacementVisitor extends ModifierVisitor<Void> {
79: 
80:         @Override
81:         public Node visit(NameExpr node, Void arg) {
82:             String name = node.getNameAsString();
83:             if (name.startsWith("Tv.")) {
84:                 String constant = name.substring(3);
85:                 if (TV_CONSTANTS.containsKey(constant)) {
86:                     return new IntegerLiteralExpr(String.valueOf(TV_CONSTANTS.get(constant)));
87:                 }
88:             }
89:             return super.visit(node, arg);
90:         }
91: 
92:         @Override
93:         public Node visit(NormalAnnotationExpr node, Void arg) {
94:             NodeList<MemberValuePair> pairs = node.getPairs();
95:             for (int i = 0; i < pairs.size(); i++) {
96:                 MemberValuePair pair = pairs.get(i);
97:                 Expression newValue = (Expression) pair.getValue().accept((ModifierVisitor<Void>) this, arg);
98:                 pair.setValue(newValue);
99:             }
100:             return super.visit(node, arg);
101:         }
102: 
103:         @Override
104:         public Node visit(SingleMemberAnnotationExpr node, Void arg) {
105:             Expression newValue = (Expression) node.getMemberValue().accept((ModifierVisitor<Void>) this, arg);
106:             node.setMemberValue(newValue);
107:             return super.visit(node, arg);
108:         }
109:     }
110: }
